heading: Regulations
label: 7633 Regulations
text: The Secretary shall prescribe regulations to carry out the Educational Assistance Program.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 4333 of this titlesubstituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 102–83
